briefdescription.para: Transfers Tx data on the bus in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: Transfers Rx data on the bus in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: Performs a transfer of Tx data on the bus in interrupt mode.
Performs a transfer of Rx data on the busin interrupt mode.
